front: Machado de Assis é considerado o maior escritor da literatura brasileira.
pronunciation: mah-SHAH-doh jee ah-SEES eh kohn-see-deh-RAH-doh oh mah-YOHR ees-kree-TOHR dah lee-teh-rah-TOO-rah brah-zee-LAY-rah.
back: Machado de Assis is considered the greatest writer of Brazilian literature.
context: Introducing the foundational realist author and founder of the Brazilian Academy of Letters.

front: O Cinema Novo foi um movimento cinematográfico importante nas décadas de sessenta e setenta.
pronunciation: oh see-NEH-mah NOH-voo foy oong moh-vee-MEHN-toh see-neh-mah-toh-GRAH-fee-koh eem-pohr-TAHN-tee nahz DEH-kah-dahz jee seh-SEHN-tah ee seh-TEHN-tah.
back: Cinema Novo was an important cinematographic movement in the sixties and seventies.
context: Discussing Brazil's influential, politically charged, and artistic film movement.

front: As telenovelas brasileiras são exportadas para dezenas de países ao redor do mundo.
pronunciation: ahz teh-leh-noh-VEH-lahz brah-zee-LAY-rahz SOHNG ees-pohr-TAH-dahz PAH-rah deh-ZEH-nahz jee pah-EE-zeez AH-oo rreh-DOHR doh MOON-doo.
back: Brazilian soap operas are exported to dozens of countries around the world.
context: Highlighting the massive global cultural export and production quality of Brazil's TV dramas.

front: O realismo mágico é uma característica marcante de diversas obras nacionais.
pronunciation: oh rreh-ah-LEEZ-moo MAH-zhee-koh eh OO-mah kah-rahk-teh-REES-tee-kah mahr-KAHN-tee jee dee-VEHR-sahz OH-brahz nah-syoh-NAHEEZ.
back: Magical realism is a striking feature of several national works.
context: Analyzing literary styles present in classic books like 'Saramandaia' or Jorge Amado's novels.

front: O Auto da Compadecida mistura comédia, drama e elementos religiosos do Nordeste.
pronunciation: oh AH-oo-too dah kohm-pah-deh-SEE-dah mees-TOO-rah koh-MEH-dyah, DRAH-mah ee eh-leh-MEHN-toohz rreh-lee-ZHEE-oh-zoohz doh nohr-DEHS-tee.
back: The Rogue's Trial mixes comedy, drama, and religious elements of the Northeast.
context: Discussing Ariano Suassuna's masterpiece play, which became a legendary movie adaptation.

front: O romance 'Grande Sertão: Veredas' é famoso por sua linguagem inventiva e complexa.
pronunciation: oh rroh-MAHN-see GRAHN-jee sehr-TOHNG veh-RAY-dahz eh fah-MOH-zoo pohr SOO-ah leeng-GWAH-zhehm een-vehn-TEE-kah ee kohm-PLEH-ksah.
back: The novel 'The Devil to Pay in the Backlands' is famous for its inventive and complex language.
context: Introducing Guimarães Rosa's modernist epic, renowned for its neologisms and philosophy.

front: Clarice Lispector é amplamente conhecida por sua narrativa introspectiva e poética.
pronunciation: klah-REE-see lees-PEK-tohr eh AHMP-lah-MEHN-tee koh-nye-SEE-dah pohr SOO-ah nahr-rah-TEE-vah een-trohs-pek-TEE-vah ee poh-EH-tee-kah.
back: Clarice Lispector is widely known for her introspective and poetic narrative.
context: Highlighting one of Brazil's most celebrated modernist female novelists.

front: O filme 'Cidade de Deus' recebeu várias indicações ao Oscar e aclamação crítica.
pronunciation: oh FEEL-mee see-DAH-jee jee DEH-ooz rreh-seh-BEH-oo VAH-ryahz een-jee-kah-SOHNGZ AH-oo OHS-kahr ee ah-klah-mah-ZOHNG kree-TEE-kah.
back: The movie 'City of God' received several Oscar nominations and critical acclaim.
context: Referencing the legendary 2002 film that achieved global cinematic fame.

front: O clímax do capítulo de ontem da novela deixou todo mundo impressionado.
pronunciation: oh KLEE-mahks doh kah-PEE-too-loo jee OHN-tehng dah noh-VEH-lah day-SHOH TOH-doh MOON-doo eem-preh-syoh-NAH-doh.
back: The climax of yesterday's soap opera episode left everyone impressed.
context: Discussing daily pop culture updates with friends or family.

front: Gosto de ler crônicas semanais nos jornais para entender o cotidiano urbano.
pronunciation: GOHS-too jee LEHR KROH-nee-kahz seh-mah-NAHEEZ noohz zhohr-NAHEEZ PAH-rah een-tehn-DEHR oh koh-tee-jee-AH-noo oor-BAH-nou.
back: I like to read weekly chronicles in the newspapers to understand urban daily life.
context: Referencing 'crônica', a highly popular Brazilian literary genre focusing on everyday life essays.

front: O modernismo brasileiro começou oficialmente na Semana de Arte Moderna de vinte e dois.
pronunciation: oh moh-dehr-NEEZ-moo brah-zee-LAY-roo koh-meh-SOH oh-fee-syahl-MEHN-tee nah seh-MAH-nah jee AHR-tee moh-DEHR-nah jee VEENG-tee ee DOYZ.
back: Brazilian modernism officially began during the Modern Art Week of 1922.
context: Highlighting the historical cultural revolution in São Paulo that reshaped local art.

front: A literatura contemporânea no Brasil aborda questões sociais urgentes das periferias.
pronunciation: ah lee-teh-rah-TOO-rah kohn-tehm-poh-RAHN-yah noo brah-ZEEL ah-BOHR-dah kes-TOHNGZ soh-SYAHEEZ oor-ZHEHN-teez dahz peh-ree-feh-REE-ahz.
back: Contemporary literature in Brazil addresses urgent social issues of the peripheries.
context: Recognizing the rise of powerful, diverse voices and marginalized narratives in modern publishing.

front: O diretor de cinema ganhou um prêmio importante no festival internacional.
pronunciation: oh jee-reh-TOHR jee see-NEH-mah gahn-YOH oong PREH-myoo eem-pohr-TAHN-tee noo fes-tee-VAHL een-tehr-nah-syoh-NAHL.
back: The film director won an important award at the international festival.
context: Discussing current successes of Brazilian filmmakers abroad (e.g., Cannes, Berlin).

front: A dublagem brasileira é reconhecida mundialmente pela sua excelente qualidade.
pronunciation: ah doo-BLAH-zhehm brah-zee-LAY-rah eh rreh-koh-nye-SEE-dah moon-dyahl-MEHN-tee PEH-lah SOO-ah eh-sheh-LEHN-tee kwah-lee-DAH-jee.
back: Brazilian dubbing is globally recognized for its excellent quality.
context: Expressing pride in the famous localization industry that voices foreign movies and series.

front: Capitu é uma personagem enigmática famosa por seus olhos de ressaca.
pronunciation: kah-pee-TOO eh OO-mah pehr-soh-NAH-zhehm ee-neeg-MAH-tee-kah fah-MOH-zah pohr SEH-ooz OH-lyooz jee rreh-SAH-kah.
back: Capitu is an enigmatic character famous for her undertow eyes.
context: Referencing the classic debate from Machado de Assis's masterpiece 'Dom Casmurro'.

front: O documentário retrata a realidade das comunidades tradicionais da Amazônia.
pronunciation: oh doh-koo-mehn-TAH-ryoo rreh-TRAH-tah ah rreh-ah-lee-DAH-jee dahz koh-moo-nee-DAH-deez trah-dee-syoh-NAHEEZ dah ah-mah-ZOH-nee-ah.
back: The documentary portrays the reality of traditional Amazonian communities.
context: Discussing non-fiction films that explore social, ecological, and indigenous themes.

front: Muitos atores consagrados começaram suas carreiras brilhando no teatro.
pronunciation: MWEE-toohz ah-TOH-rez kohn-sah-GRAH-doohz koh-meh-SAH-rahm SOO-ahz kahr-RAY-rahz bree-LYAHN-doh noo teh-AH-troo.
back: Many renowned actors started their careers shining in the theater.
context: Analyzing the training pipeline and cultural significance of stage productions in Brazil.

front: A trilha sonora daquela novela das nove marcou uma geração inteira.
pronunciation: ah TREE-lyah soh-NOH-rah dah-KEH-lyah noh-VEH-lah dahz NOH-vee mahr-KOH OO-mah zheh-rah-ZOHNG een-TAY-rah.
back: The soundtrack of that 9 p.m. soap opera defined an entire generation.
context: Discussing the iconic music tracks that accompany prime-time TV shows.

front: Os festivais de literatura ajudam a promover novos autores nacionais.
pronunciation: ohz fes-tee-VAHEEZ jee lee-teh-rah-TOO-rah ah-ZHOO-dahm ah proh-moh-VEHR NOH-voohz ah-oo-TOH-rez nah-syoh-NAHEEZ.
back: Literature festivals help promote new national authors.
context: Highlighting events like FLIP (Festa Literária Internacional de Paraty) that boost reading.

front: O roteiro do filme foi adaptado de um conto clássico de terror.
pronunciation: oh rroh-TAY-roo doh FEEL-mee foy ah-dahp-TAH-doh jee oong KOHN-too KLAH-see-koh jee tehr-ROHR.
back: The movie script was adapted from a classic horror short story.
context: Discussing adaptation processes in film pre-production.

front: A censura artística durante a ditadura militar silenciou muitos intelectuais.
pronunciation: ah sehn-SOO-rah ahr-TEES-tee-kah doo-RAHN-tee ah jee-tah-DOO-rah mee-lee-TAHR see-lehn-see-OH MWEE-toohz een-teh-lek-TWAHEEZ.
back: Artistic censorship during the military dictatorship silenced many intellectuals.
context: Highlighting a darker historical period that impacted books, plays, and songs.

front: Jorge Amado retratou a sensualidade e o misticismo da Bahia em suas obras.
pronunciation: ZHOR-zhee ah-MAH-doh rreh-trah-TOH ah sehn-soo-ah-lee-DAH-jee ee oh mees-tee-SEEZ-moo dah bah-EE-ah ehng SOO-ahz OH-brahz.
back: Jorge Amado portrayed the sensuality and mysticism of Bahia in his works.
context: Analyzing the regional charm and vibrant characters of books like 'Gabriela, Cravo e Canela'.

front: A crítica de cinema elogiou a atuação realista da atriz principal.
pronunciation: ah KREE-tee-kah jee see-NEH-mah eh-loh-zhee-OH ah ah-twah-ZOHNG rreh-ah-LEES-tah dah ah-TREES preen-see-PAHL.
back: The film critic praised the realistic performance of the lead actress.
context: Sharing professional opinions or media reviews of new movie releases.

front: O folhetim televisivo utiliza ganchos dramáticos para prender a atenção do público.
pronunciation: oh fohl-yeh-TEENG teh-leh-vee-ZEE-voo oo-tee-LEE-zah GAHN-shoohz drah-MAH-tee-koohz PAH-rah prehn-DEHR ah ah-tehn-ZOHNG doh POO-blee-koh.
back: The television serial uses dramatic hooks to hold the audience's attention.
context: Explaining cliffhangers in soap opera structures ('folhetim' is a literary/serial term).

front: Siriema e carcará são animais frequentemente mencionados na literatura do sertão.
pronunciation: see-ree-EH-mah ee kahr-kah-RAH SOHNG ah-nee-MAHEEZ freh-kwehn-tah-MEHN-tee mehn-syoh-NAH-doohz nah lee-teh-rah-TOO-rah doh sehr-TOHNG.
back: Siriema and carcará are animals frequently mentioned in hinterland literature.
context: Connecting geography, fauna, and regional literary themes of the semi-arid Northeast.

front: A poesia de Carlos Drummond de Andrade foca na melancolia e no cotidiano.
pronunciation: ah poh-eh-ZEE-ah jee KAHR-loohz droom-MOHND jee ahn-DRAH-jee FOH-kah nah meh-lahn-koh-LEE-ah ee noo koh-tee-jee-AH-noo.
back: Carlos Drummond de Andrade's poetry focuses on melancholy and daily life.
context: Discussing one of Brazil's most loved and internationally translated modernist poets.

front: Esse cineasta independente produziu um longa-metragem com pouquíssimo orçamento.
pronunciation: EHS-see see-neh-AHS-tah een-deh-pehn-DEHN-tee proh-doo-ZEW oong LOONG-gah meh-TRAH-zhehm kohm-poh-KEE-see-moo ohr-sah-MEHN-toh.

context: Discussing guerrilla filmmaking and indie cinema projects ('longa-metragem' = feature film).

front: A vilã da novela das nove costuma ser a personagem mais comentada.
pronunciation: ah vee-LAH dah noh-VEH-lah dahz NOH-vee koos-TOO-mah SEHR ah pehr-soh-NAH-zhehm MAHEES koh-mehn-TAH-dah.

context: Highlighting the cultural impact of iconic, scheming female antagonists on television.

front: Quero comprar aquela edição especial com capa dura e ilustrações originais.
pronunciation: KEH-roo kohm-PRAHR ah-KEH-lyah eh-jee-ZOHNG ees-peh-syAHL kohm KAH-pah DOO-rah ee ee-loos-trah-SOHNGZ oh-ree-zhee-NAHEEZ.

front: O curta-metragem foi selecionado para participar de uma mostra de cinema internacional.

front: A narrativa em primeira pessoa aproxima o leitor dos segredos do protagonista.
pronunciation: ah nahr-rah-TEE-vah eheng pree-MAY-rah peh-SOH-ah ah-proh-SEE-mah oh lay-TOHR doohz seh-GREH-doohz doh proh-tah-goh-NEES-tah.

front: O clássico livro infantil 'O Sítio do Picapau Amarelo' marcou gerações.
pronunciation: oh KLAH-see-koh LEE-vroo een-fahn-TEEL oh SEE-tyoo doh pee-kah-PAH-oo ah-mah-REH-loo mahr-KOH zheh-rah-SOHNGZ.

front: A atuação comovente do ator principal nos fez chorar no final do filme.

pronunciation: ahz eh-mee-SOH-rahz eeng-VES-tehm mee-LYOHNGZ jee rreh-AHEEZ ehng eh-FAY-toohz vee-zoo-AHEEZ jee OOL-tee-mah zheh-rah-ZOHNG.

front: Essa biografia revela detalhes inéditos sobre a vida pessoal do escritor.
pronunciation: EHS-sah bee-oh-grah-FEE-ah rreh-VEH-lah deh-TAH-lyees ee-NEH-jee-toohz SOH-bree ah VEE-dah pes-SOH-ahl doh ees-kree-TOHR.

front: O cinema nacional precisa de mais incentivo público para continuar crescendo.
pronunciation: oh see-NEH-mah nah-syoh-NAHL pree-SEE-zah jee MAHEES een-sehn-TEE-voo POO-blee-koh PAH-rah kohn-tee-NWAHR kreh-SHEHN-doh.

front: Fiquei sabendo que a novela vai reprisar no canal de TV por assinatura.
pronunciation: fee-KAY sah-BEHN-doh keh ah noh-VEH-lah VAY rreh-pree-ZAHR noo kah-NAHL jee teh-VEH pohr ah-see-nah-TOO-rah.
